positive: A minimalist and whimsical depiction of a forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of tall pine trees and woodland creatures (rabbits, foxes, deer) nestled among oversized, stylized ferns and mushrooms. The style should be inspired by modern Scandinavian illustration, using thick, crisp lines, flat areas of color, and a strong sense of graphic simplicity. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical for apparel printing. Color palette: deep forest green, muted burnt orange, cream, and charcoal grey. High contrast, clean edges, suitable for screen printing on natural fabric. Vector art aesthetic, highly detailed silhouette.
